issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringThisTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the boost lasts only while the turn is active, not until end of turn.
Extraneous effect detected. The second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and SearchDeck action has no basis in the card text. Only Counter trigger with PowerBoost and DrawCard are mentioned.
Target scope should allow 'Up to 1', which means it can be optional/zero targets. Current 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' may not properly represent 'up to 1' optionality.
